name: mk/phy-therapies-section
title: Therapies Section
description: Our Therapies section: header + expandable therapy cards, matching physiotherapy-rehab.html.

sectionSubtitle.default: A multimodal approach to faster recovery.

attributes.sectionSubtitle: A multimodal approach to faster recovery.

attributes.title: Manual Therapy
attributes.description: Hands-on techniques to mobilize joints and soft tissues, reducing pain and increasing range of motion.

attributes.title: Electrotherapy
attributes.description: Using advanced modalities like Ultrasound, TENS, and IFT to manage pain and stimulate muscle healing.

attributes.title: Exercise Therapy
attributes.description: Customized exercise plans to strengthen muscles, improve balance, and prevent re-injury.

attributes.title: Post-Op Rehab
attributes.description: Specialized care after surgeries like knee replacement or hip replacement to get you back on your feet.
